summary: Implemented ADR 0230 from the rebased latest-origin/main worktree by moving command approval, promotion gating, and validation-gate policy decisions onto one shared OPA and Conftest bundle, replaying the Windmill runtime live on docker-runtime-lv3, and re-verifying the worker-side approval and gate-status paths directly on the mirrored repo checkout.

verification.observed: `python3 scripts/policy_checks.py --validate` passed, and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_policy_checks.py tests/test_command_catalog.py tests/test_promotion_pipeline.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py` returned `35 passed in 4.30s` after the rebased `scripts/command_catalog.py` compatibility fix restored optional `entrypoint_target` output.

verification.check: Windmill syntax and mirrored worker checkout wiring
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-windmill` passed after the worker checkout defaults and sync tasks were updated to mirror the rebased worktree, include the ADR 0230 policy helpers, and strip stale macOS metadata files before the runtime replay.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0230-live-apply-r2` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=229 changed=38 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`.

`ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml docker-runtime-lv3 -m shell -a 'cd /srv/proxmox_florin_server && python3 scripts/policy_checks.py --validate' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` returned `ADR 0230 policy checks OK: /srv/proxmox_florin_server/policy`, and a follow-up `find /srv/proxmox_florin_server/policy -type f \( -name "._*" -o -name ".DS_Store" \) -print` returned no paths.

verification.check: Worker-side approval and validation-gate status path
verification.observed: `ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml docker-runtime-lv3 -m shell -a 'cd /srv/proxmox_florin_server && python3 scripts/command_catalog.py --check-approval --command converge-windmill --requester-class human_operator --approver-classes human_operator --validation-passed --preflight-passed --receipt-planned && python3 config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py --repo-path /srv/proxmox_florin_server' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` returned `Command approval OK: converge-windmill` and listed `policy-validation` in the enabled gate checks.

`PROMOTION_PROMETHEUS_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/promotion_pipeline.py --check-gate --service grafana --staging-receipt receipts/live-applies/staging/2026-03-27-adr-0183-staging-live-apply.json` exited non-zero with `gate_decision: rejected`, proving the shared OPA gate aggregated concrete reasons including `projected vCPU commitment 36.0 exceeds target 22.5`, `staging receipt is older than 24 hours`, and `SLO gate could not evaluate`.

notes: The live replay ran from the rebased latest-origin/main worktree instead of a second literal-main replay, so the subsequent mainline integration keeps the existing platform version 0.130.42 while still recording ADR 0230 as live applied.

The worker checkout contract now mirrors the shared policy bundle and policy helpers from the selected worktree path and removes `._*` and `.DS_Store` metadata files before worker-side validation or approval wrappers execute.
